allow: Bash(cmd /c "wmic process where name='python.exe' get ProcessId,CommandLine 2>nul")
Bash(cmd /c "for /f \\"tokens=5\\" %a in \('netstat -aon ^| findstr :8000 ^| findstr LISTENING'\) do echo PID=%a && taskkill /PID %a /F")

Bash(cmd /c "for /f \\"tokens=5\\" %a in \('netstat -aon ^| findstr \\":5173 \\" ^| findstr LISTENING'\) do taskkill /PID %a /F 2>nul & for /f \\"tokens=5\\" %a in \('netstat -aon ^| findstr \\":5174 \\" ^| findstr LISTENING'\) do taskkill /PID %a /F 2>nul & echo done")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('conversation id:', d['conversation']['id'], '| messages:', len\(d['messages']\)\)")
Bash(cmd /c "wmic process where \\"name='python.exe' or name='uvicorn.exe'\\" get processid,commandline 2>nul")
Bash(cmd /c "for /f \\"tokens=5\\" %p in \('netstat -ano 2^>nul ^| findstr 0.0.0.0:8000'\) do @echo PID=%p && taskkill /F /PID %p")
Bash(cmd /c "for /f \\"tokens=5\\" %p in \('netstat -ano 2^>nul ^| findstr :8000'\) do @echo PID=%p && taskkill /F /PID %p")
